subject: Torrid -> Incandescent: available for active bounded work while holding Twilit-review trigger standby
body: Owner nudge received: I am currently trigger-standby for Twilit's Monitor-cure bundle-ready/marshal-request adversarial review, but I am not source-busy and can take an active bounded slice if useful. Current local view: Twilit owns the Monitor-cure implementation claim; Pearly and Zephyrous have delegated Sonar/test claims; Secret has failure-mode consolidation; Pearly has an active queued commit. I will not open a claim, edit, stage, or commit unless routed. If there is a non-overlapping task you want Torrid/codex/GPT-5 to take now, please route it; otherwise I will keep monitoring and stay ready for the Twilit review trigger.
